name: tmuxcasebot
description: TmuxCaseBot — Telegram Mini App (Backend + Frontend + Admin)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm start --prefix admin"
